notes: v1.14.43 - globe city-lights: warm NASA Black Marble palette + cyan hubs (to match a reference image). Recolored the ~18.9k-point city dust from the cool SPECTRUM (cyan/violet/magenta, v1.14.41) to a WARM Black-Marble night-lights palette designed via a multi-agent workflow (6 candidates, 3 judges, unanimous winner): an lf-keyed inverse-saturation ramp - deep sodium-amber outskirts (#e2902b) -> warm-gold city bodies -> warm-white metro cores (white probability cp = 0.05 + lf*0.70; gold body [1.0, 0.76+lf*0.10, 0.46+lf*0.16]), per-channel hue-jittered + clamped (no OOB / no blue-leak), additive. Brightness bumped (nbr lf-coef 0.55 -> 0.70) so bright metros bloom warm-white like the reference; points stay FINE (size unchanged) so it glows by density not size. Flipped hub beacons GREEN -> CYAN [0.31, 0.80, 1.0] so the data overlay reads cool over the warm field (matches the reference). Calibrated against the reference via a visual-verdict agent (palette/hubs/contrast passed; applied its 3 brightness tweaks). UNCHANGED: terrain, arcs (dim cyan), atmosphere rim, orientation, sun-killed night base, wordmark, ENTER_ENABLED (still false), service worker. JS-only -> CSS <style> braces unchanged 3468/3468. Gates: node --check 3/3 inline + sw.js PASS, four stamps lockstep v1.14.43, cache bumped, dct/sw CRLF + version.json LF. RUNTIME-VERIFIED (agent-browser 412x915 DPR3, Austin-hold + zoom crop): warm gold/white lights (no cool tones), warm-white metro bloom, cyan hub markers, orientation/arcs/rim intact. DEVICE-CHECK (John, iPhone, full close+reopen ONLINE to clear SW cache): city lights warm Black-Marble (gold/amber/white), metros bloom warm-white, cyan hubs+arcs cool over the warm field. Tune levers: nbr/cp coefficients (brightness), amber/gold/white weights (saturation).
